caption: The video displays a static black screen featuring white and colorful text and icons. Centered at the top is the phrase "Thanks for watching!" in a bold, white sans-serif font. Below this greeting, three social media handles are listed vertically. The first is an Instagram handle featuring the Instagram logo and the text "@StevenDunks". The second is a Twitter handle featuring the Twitter bird logo and the text "@StevieCeli". The third is a podcast reference featuring a purple microphone icon and the text "Neverending Conversations Podcast". The scene remains completely unchanged across the sequence, with the layout, colors, and text remaining fixed in a centered alignment against the dark background. There are no people, physical locations, or movements visible in the clip.
